sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 6.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 6.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 66.3g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 66.3g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 16.9g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 16.9g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV, zinc at 36% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV, zinc at 36% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. contains useful beta-glucans because adds cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display. easy to build meals around because works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns. can support digestive regularity because the fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

sections.subtitleText: pros first. contains useful beta-glucans because adds cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display. easy to build meals around because works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns. can support digestive regularity because the fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. contains some anti-nutrients because that can slightly reduce mineral absorption. healthiness depends on what you add to it because sweet add-ons can change the whole picture. not ideal for everyone digestively because some people just do not tolerate it that well.

displayItems.explanation: Phytates may slightly reduce mineral uptake.

displayItems.title: healthiness depends on what you add to it
displayItems.explanation: Sugary toppings can shift the outcome a lot.

displayItems.title: not ideal for everyone digestively
displayItems.explanation: Some people do not tolerate oats especially well.

closing.summary: Oats stands out for contains useful beta-glucans and easy to build meals around. but it also gets held back by contains some anti-nutrients and healthiness depends on what you add to it. Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
